metadata.title:
NORTHSIDE DEMANDS
RELIEF FROM CITY

Either Furnish Water or Quit Collecting Pay


for Empty Mains and No Service.

pages.raw_text:
The mayor and city council are
going to hear officially from the
northside on the water question.
The following plain statement Is
being circulated as petition and
the number of signatures 1t will
have may awaken at least rip
pie Of interest in a body that has
avoided every means within its
power to improve the water sys-
tenn In the past two years. Here
is the petition:


ITO the Honorable Mayor and
Executive Body Of the City of Spo-
kane: Owing to the fact that we,
the undersigned citizens of Allen
dale, Monroe Park and Pine Grove
Terrace additions, lying north on
the hill between Washington and
Jefferson streets, have been en-
tirely without water for a number
of days from 8 a. m. until as late
as 9 and 10 p. m, not even hav-
ing water to drink or cook with.
In one instance we are informed
Of one family under quarantine not
having a drink for a number OF
house. having suffered greatly from
the effects.
